title: hyptis lobata
intro: Hyptis lobata, also known as Mexican mint or bush mint, is a perennial herb native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. Its leaves and flowers possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The plant is used to treat digestive issues, relieve respiratory problems, and reduce fever, among other uses. In herbal preparations, Hyptis lobata can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to calm the digestive system and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
